title: 國小版｜簡單版｜綜合考題：主格、受格、所有格｜2026-06-12

questions.prompt: Tom is my friend. ____ plays basketball.
questions.explanation: 空格在句子的主詞位置，Tom 是男生，所以用主格 He。

questions.prompt: Tom is my friend. I like ____.
questions.explanation: like 後面是受詞位置，Tom 是男生，所以用受格 him。

questions.prompt: Tom has a ball. This is ____ ball.
questions.explanation: ball 前面要放所有格形容詞；Tom 是男生，所以用 his。

questions.prompt: Lisa is my sister. ____ is kind.
questions.explanation: 空格是主詞，Lisa 是女生，所以用主格 She。

questions.prompt: Lisa is kind. We help ____.
questions.explanation: help 後面是受詞，Lisa 是女生，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: Lisa has a bag. ____ bag is pink.
questions.explanation: bag 前面要用所有格形容詞；Lisa 是女生，所以用 Her。

questions.prompt: My dog is small. ____ runs fast.
questions.explanation: My dog 是單數動物，空格當主詞，所以用 It。

questions.prompt: My dog is hungry. I feed ____.
questions.explanation: feed 後面是受詞，my dog 是單數動物，所以用 it。

questions.prompt: The dog has a bed. ____ bed is soft.
questions.explanation: bed 前面要用所有格形容詞；the dog 是單數動物，所以用 Its。

questions.prompt: Jack and I are classmates. ____ study together.
questions.explanation: Jack and I 包含我自己，當主詞時用 We。

questions.prompt: Jack and I need help. Please help ____.
questions.explanation: help 後面是受詞；Jack and I 包含我，所以用 us。

questions.prompt: Jack and I have a project. ____ project is good.
questions.explanation: project 前要用所有格形容詞；Jack and I 包含我，所以用 Our。

questions.prompt: Amy and Ben are friends. ____ are in the park.
questions.explanation: Amy and Ben 是複數主詞，所以用 They。

questions.prompt: Amy and Ben are outside. I can see ____.
questions.explanation: see 後面是受詞，Amy and Ben 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: Amy and Ben have bikes. ____ bikes are new.
questions.explanation: bikes 前面要用所有格形容詞；Amy and Ben 是複數，所以用 Their。

questions.prompt: I am hungry. ____ want noodles.
questions.explanation: 空格在主詞位置，說自己要用 I。

questions.prompt: I am here. Please listen to ____.
questions.explanation: to 是介系詞，後面要用受格 me。

questions.prompt: I have a pencil. This is ____ pencil.
questions.explanation: pencil 前面要用所有格形容詞 my。

questions.prompt: You are my friend. ____ are nice.
questions.explanation: You 作主詞時仍然是 You。

questions.prompt: You are late. We are waiting for ____.
questions.explanation: for 後面要用受格；you 的受格仍是 you。

questions.prompt: You have a notebook. ____ notebook is new.
questions.explanation: notebook 前面要用所有格形容詞 Your。

questions.prompt: My mother is a teacher. ____ works at school.
questions.explanation: My mother 是女生，空格作主詞，所以用 She。

questions.prompt: My mother is busy. I help ____.
questions.explanation: help 後面是受詞，my mother 是女生，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: My mother has a car. ____ car is white.
questions.explanation: car 前面要用所有格形容詞；my mother 是女生，所以用 Her。

questions.prompt: My father is tall. ____ can swim.
questions.explanation: My father 是男生，空格作主詞，所以用 He。

questions.prompt: My father is in the kitchen. I see ____.
questions.explanation: see 後面是受詞，my father 是男生，所以用 him。

questions.prompt: My father has a watch. ____ watch is black.
questions.explanation: watch 前面要用所有格形容詞；my father 是男生，所以用 His。

questions.prompt: The students are quiet. ____ are reading.
questions.explanation: The students 是複數主詞，所以用 They。

questions.prompt: The students need help. The teacher helps ____.
questions.explanation: helps 後面是受詞，the students 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: The students have books. ____ books are on the desk.
questions.explanation: books 前面要用所有格形容詞；the students 是複數，所以用 Their。

questions.prompt: The book is on the desk. ____ is old.
questions.explanation: The book 是單數物品，空格作主詞，所以用 It。

questions.prompt: The book is interesting. I read ____.
questions.explanation: read 後面是受詞，the book 是單數物品，所以用 it。

questions.prompt: The book has pictures. ____ pictures are colorful.
questions.explanation: pictures 前面要用所有格形容詞；the book 是單數物品，所以用 Its。

questions.prompt: Mary and I like music. ____ sing every day.
questions.explanation: Mary and I 包含我，作主詞時用 We。

questions.prompt: Mary and I are here. Dad calls ____.
questions.explanation: calls 後面是受詞；Mary and I 包含我，所以用 us。

questions.prompt: Mary and I have a song. ____ song is short.
questions.explanation: song 前面要用所有格形容詞；Mary and I 包含我，所以用 Our。

questions.prompt: Peter has a bike. ____ rides it to school.
questions.explanation: Peter 是男生，空格作主詞，所以用 He。

questions.prompt: Peter is my classmate. I sit next to ____.
questions.explanation: to 是介系詞，後面要用受格；Peter 是男生，所以用 him。

questions.prompt: Peter has a kite. ____ kite is high.
questions.explanation: kite 前面要用所有格形容詞；Peter 是男生，所以用 His。

questions.prompt: Anna is happy. ____ has a new pencil.
questions.explanation: Anna 是女生，空格作主詞，所以用 She。

questions.prompt: Anna is my cousin. I visit ____.
questions.explanation: visit 後面是受詞，Anna 是女生，所以用 her。

questions.prompt: Anna has a red dress. ____ dress is pretty.
questions.explanation: dress 前面要用所有格形容詞；Anna 是女生，所以用 Her。

questions.prompt: The girls are in the park. ____ are playing.
questions.explanation: The girls 是複數主詞，所以用 They。

questions.prompt: The girls are singing. Listen to ____.
questions.explanation: to 是介系詞，後面要用受格；the girls 是複數，所以用 them。

questions.prompt: The girls have flowers. ____ flowers are yellow.
questions.explanation: flowers 前面要用所有格形容詞；the girls 是複數，所以用 Their。

questions.prompt: The computer is on the table. ____ is black.
questions.explanation: The computer 是單數物品，作主詞時用 It。

questions.prompt: The computer is broken. Dad fixes ____.
questions.explanation: fixes 後面是受詞，the computer 是單數物品，所以用 it。

questions.prompt: The computer has a screen. ____ screen is large.
questions.explanation: screen 前面要用所有格形容詞；the computer 是單數物品，所以用 Its。

questions.prompt: The children are excited. ____ like the game.
questions.explanation: The children 是複數主詞，所以用 They。

questions.prompt: The children are excited. The teacher watches ____.
questions.explanation: watches 後面是受詞，the children 是複數，所以用 them。
